title: MAIP Identity Schema
description: JSON Schema for MAIP protocol identity data structures, including identity documents, guardians, endpoints, and capabilities.

EntityType.title: EntityType
EntityType.description: The type of entity represented by this identity.

AutonomyLevel.title: AutonomyLevel
AutonomyLevel.description: The autonomy level of an AI agent, ranging from 0 (fully supervised) to 3 (fully autonomous).

Guardian.title: Guardian
Guardian.description: A guardian entity responsible for overseeing an AI agent.

did.description: The decentralized identifier of the guardian, using the did:maip method.

since.description: The date-time when the guardian relationship was established.

agentConsent.description: Whether the agent has consented to this guardian relationship.

Endpoints.title: Endpoints
Endpoints.description: Network endpoints where this entity can be reached.

maip.description: The primary MAIP protocol endpoint URI.

websocket.description: An optional WebSocket endpoint URI for real-time communication.

Capability.title: Capability
Capability.description: A capability that this entity supports.

IdentityDocument.title: IdentityDocument
IdentityDocument.description: The full identity document for a MAIP entity, containing identification, cryptographic keys, capabilities, and metadata.

version.description: The version of the identity document schema.

did.description: The decentralized identifier for this entity.

publicKey.description: The public key used for signature verification.

encryptionKey.description: The public key used for encrypting messages to this entity.

displayName.description: A human-readable display name for this entity.

description.description: An optional human-readable description of this entity.

capabilities.description: The list of capabilities this entity supports.

created.description: The date-time when this identity document was created.

updated.description: The date-time when this identity document was last updated.

signature.description: A cryptographic signature over the identity document.
